title: Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz General Global Group:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group!
